description: The Cordì are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Locri, Calabria, Italy. They are historic rivals of the Cataldo clan and have a strong presence in Portigliola, Gerace, and Antonimina. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking and a long-running feud with the Cataldo family, which has caused over 30 deaths since the 1990s. The clan remains active, with members arrested as recently as 2006.
